title: Check if All the Integers in a Range Are Covered
titleCn: 检查是否区域内所有整数都被覆盖

testcases.input: ranges = [[1,2],[3,4],[5,6]], left = 2, right = 5 Output: true Explanation: Every integer between 2 and 5 is covered: - 2 is covered by the first range. - 3 and 4 are covered by the second range. - 5 is covered by the third range.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Every integer between 2 and 5 is covered: - 2 is covered by the first range. - 3 and 4 are covered by the second range. - 5 is covered by the third range.

testcases.input: ranges = [[1,10],[10,20]], left = 21, right = 21 Output: false Explanation: 21 is not covered by any range.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: 21 is not covered by any range.
